mapper.select:
SELECT a.id technicianId,`name`,order_number orderNumber,price,introduction,score,lng,lat,head_img headImg FROM app_user_b_message as a WHERE a.business_type = 1 AND wrok_type = 3
ORDER BY score DESC
ORDER BY order_number DESC
limit #{pagesize},20
SELECT * FROM app_user_b_message WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND wrok_type = #{i}
SELECT * FROM app_user_b_message WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND wrok_type = 4
